name: Cat Gets Medieval
short_description: Explore an amazing fantasy world as a magical cat! Team up with your cat crew, climb castle walls, blast magic, and hunt the six lost crown pieces to save the kingdom.
detailed_description:
Cast aside the mundane world of mortals and rise as a feline champion destined for greatness. Gather your friends to  embark on a sweeping journey across a kingdom on the brink of ruin. Scale ancient battlements, infiltrate human settlements, and unleash your chaos upon  the realm.

Within the depths of forgotten dungeons lie relics of immense power. Claim them to awaken elemental abilities: flames that roar from your throat, shadows that bend to your will, or beams of pure arcane force that blaze from your eyes. A greater challenge awaits you the royal crown lies shattered, its six fragments scattered across the land. Only by restoring it can you halt the encroaching darkness.

Explore new lands, solve their problems, or cause some of your own. It’s all open to you in this cat-tastic purrtacular adventure!

Key Features

  • Quest and explore a huge interactive open world

  • Delve the depths of crypts, caves, dungeons, and abandoned fortresses for lost artifacts

  • Each character can access unique powerful artifacts that aligns with their elements

  • Character progression and development to improve your strength, health and magic

  • Tons of quests and interactive characters

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Finnish, Portuguese - Portugal
